name: @homehub/db
description: HomeHub database: Supabase migrations, local stack config, and generated TypeScript types.

scripts.db:reset: echo 'ERROR: db:reset is disabled. Use db:reset:local for local dev only. Never run supabase db reset against staging/prod — roll-forward with a corrective migration instead. See packages/db/README.md.' && exit 1
scripts.db:reset:local: echo 'WARNING: destroying local Supabase state and re-applying migrations from scratch. Local only. Ctrl-C within 3s to abort.' && sleep 3 && supabase db reset --local
scripts.db:types: supabase gen types typescript --local --schema app,mem,sync,audit > src/types.generated.ts
